# CannaVerse Academy

A premium online cannabis education platform offering industry-standard training across four core pillars: cultivation, manufacturing, medicine, and retail compliance. The school positions itself as the definitive authority in cannabis professional education, delivering world-class course content designed to meet and exceed industry benchmarks. With a $190 enrollment price point and built-in monetization, the platform is built for immediate revenue generation while empowering students with the most comprehensive cannabis curriculum available.

Source: https://example.com

---

Academic Curriculum


## Four Pillars of Cannabis Professional Education


CannaVerse Academy delivers the most comprehensive medical cannabis courses available — each module engineered to meet and exceed industry benchmarks, preparing you for a verified career in the legal cannabis sector.











01

### Cannabis Cultivation



Master the complete lifecycle of cannabis cultivation — from genetics and propagation to harvest optimization — using methods validated by licensed growers and regulatory bodies.



What You Will Master


- Plant biology, genetics, and strain selection

- Indoor, outdoor, and greenhouse growing systems

- Integrated pest management and environmental controls

- Harvest, drying, curing, and quality assessment

- Regulatory compliance for cultivation facilities





Designed For


Aspiring cultivators, farm managers, greenhouse operators, and agricultural professionals entering the cannabis industry.




Industry Alignment


Curriculum meets state licensing requirements and Good Agricultural Practice (GAP) standards for legal cannabis cultivation.










02

### Cannabis Manufacturing



Gain expert-level proficiency in cannabis extraction, product formulation, and GMP-compliant manufacturing — the technical foundation for every licensed processing facility.



What You Will Master


- Extraction methods: CO₂, ethanol, hydrocarbon, and solventless

- Post-processing, distillation, and winterization

- Edibles, tinctures, topicals, and concentrate formulation

- Quality control, lab testing, and COA interpretation

- Lean manufacturing principles and facility SOP development





Designed For


Extraction technicians, product developers, lab managers, and manufacturing professionals seeking cannabis industry credentials.




Industry Alignment


Aligned with GMP, ISO 22000, and state-specific manufacturing compliance frameworks for licensed cannabis processors.










03

### Cannabis Medicine



Develop a rigorous clinical and scientific understanding of cannabis therapeutics — the knowledge that separates credentialed professionals from uninformed practitioners in the medical cannabis space.



What You Will Master


- Endocannabinoid system, cannabinoids, and terpene pharmacology

- Evidence-based therapeutic applications and contraindications

- Patient assessment, dosing protocols, and delivery methods

- Medical cannabis program regulations and caregiver compliance

- Integrating cannabis into clinical and wellness practice





Designed For


Healthcare providers, wellness consultants, patient advocates, caregivers, and professionals advising medical cannabis patients.




Industry Alignment


Content is grounded in peer-reviewed clinical research and state medical cannabis program certification standards.










04

### Retail & Compliance



Command every dimension of cannabis retail operations and regulatory compliance — the essential competency for dispensary professionals, license holders, and compliance officers navigating the legal market.



What You Will Master


- Dispensary operations, inventory management, and POS systems

- State seed-to-sale tracking (METRC, BioTrackTHC)

- Responsible vendor training and age verification protocols

- Anti-diversion, security, and recordkeeping requirements

- Customer education, product knowledge, and sales compliance





Designed For


Dispensary managers, budtenders, license applicants, compliance officers, and retail entrepreneurs entering cannabis commerce.




Industry Alignment


Curriculum maps directly to state cannabis control board requirements and Responsible Vendor Program (RVP) certification standards.











Full access to all four academic pillars — one enrollment, one price.

Enroll Now — $190

All Courses














CannaVerse Academy — Full Curriculum Overview

# The Definitive Standard in Cannabis Professional Education


CannaVerse Academy is the premier destination for medical cannabis courses and industry-standard professional training. Our comprehensive curriculum spans four core pillars — cultivation, manufacturing, medicine, and retail compliance — delivering world-class content engineered to meet and exceed the highest benchmarks in the cannabis industry. Every learner enters through a single, accessible enrollment path at $190, unlocking the most complete cannabis education available anywhere.
















## Our Educational Philosophy


At CannaVerse Academy, we believe that rigorous, structured education is the foundation of a thriving cannabis industry. Our curriculum is built by practitioners, regulators, and researchers who understand what it takes to succeed at every level of the supply chain — from seed to sale.


We don't offer surface-level overviews. Each program module is crafted to deliver actionable, industry-verified knowledge that translates directly into professional competence. Whether you're entering the industry for the first time or advancing an existing career, our courses are designed to position you as a credentialed, confident professional.


- Cultivation & Horticultural Science

- Manufacturing & Extraction Standards

- Medical Cannabis & Patient Care

- Retail Operations & Regulatory Compliance



Single Enrollment Path
$190
All learners access the complete curriculum through one unified enrollment. No hidden fees, no tiered paywalls.







A structured professional learning environment — the CannaVerse Academy standard.



















Core Curriculum




## Four Pillars of Professional Cannabis Education


CannaVerse Academy's curriculum is built around the four core disciplines that define the modern cannabis industry. Each program meets and exceeds current regulatory benchmarks, equipping graduates with verified, career-ready expertise.










01
Cultivation

### Cannabis Cultivation & Agronomy


Master the full lifecycle of the cannabis plant — from seed selection and genetics to harvest, drying, and curing. This program delivers the scientific foundation and hands-on methodology that commercial cultivators and craft growers alike require to produce consistent, compliant, premium-grade cannabis. Our medical cannabis courses in cultivation are recognized as the most comprehensive available.


- Understand plant physiology, nutrient cycles, and integrated pest management to maximize yield quality and regulatory compliance.

- Design and manage indoor, outdoor, and greenhouse growing environments that meet state and federal safety standards.

- Apply post-harvest processing protocols — drying, curing, trimming, and storage — to preserve cannabinoid and terpene profiles.


















02
Manufacturing

### Cannabis Manufacturing & Extraction


From crude extraction to finished consumer products, this program covers every stage of cannabis manufacturing with precision. Students gain command of solvent and solventless extraction techniques, refinement processes, and product formulation — all grounded in Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) standards and industry-grade quality control frameworks.


- Execute CO₂, ethanol, hydrocarbon, and rosin extraction methods with laboratory-grade accuracy and safety protocols.

- Formulate concentrates, edibles, tinctures, and topicals in compliance with state packaging, labeling, and dosage regulations.

- Implement batch tracking, SOPs, and quality assurance testing workflows aligned with current GMP and lean manufacturing principles.


















03
Medicine

### Cannabis Medicine & Patient Care


One of the most rigorous medical cannabis courses available, this program bridges clinical pharmacology with patient-centered practice. Designed for healthcare professionals, patient advocates, and dispensary staff, it covers the endocannabinoid system, cannabinoid therapeutics, condition-specific protocols, and the ethical dimensions of cannabis-based patient care.


- Analyze the endocannabinoid system and the pharmacokinetics of THC, CBD, and minor cannabinoids to guide evidence-based recommendations.

- Develop condition-specific cannabis therapy protocols for pain management, neurological conditions, mental health, and palliative care.

- Navigate drug interactions, contraindications, dosing strategies, and informed-consent practices across diverse patient populations.


















04
Retail Compliance

### Retail Operations & Regulatory Compliance


The cannabis retail environment demands a precise command of compliance, customer service, and operational management. This program prepares dispensary owners, managers, and frontline staff to operate with confidence — covering state licensing frameworks, seed-to-sale tracking, inventory control, responsible sales practices, and the legal obligations that govern every transaction.


- Navigate state and municipal licensing requirements, application processes, and ongoing regulatory reporting obligations for cannabis retailers.

- Implement seed-to-sale tracking systems, inventory auditing procedures, and loss-prevention strategies that withstand regulatory inspection.

- Train staff in responsible vendor practices, ID verification, purchase limits, and ethical consultative sales to ensure compliant customer interactions.



















Full Program Access


### All Four Pillars. One Enrollment.


Gain lifetime access to every module across all four core programs for a single enrollment fee — the most comprehensive cannabis curriculum available at any price point.




$190
Full Enrollment

Enroll Now

Immediate access upon payment • Industry-recognized certification



















Why Professionals Choose Us


## The Definitive Standard inCannabis Professional Education










### World-Class Curriculum Depth


CannaVerse Academy delivers the most comprehensive medical cannabis courses available anywhere online. Each module is engineered to meet and exceed industry benchmarks — covering cultivation science, extraction chemistry, medical applications, and regulatory compliance with the rigor of a top-tier certification body. You won't find a more thorough curriculum at any price point.

01





### Practical Compliance Relevance


Regulatory landscapes shift constantly — our curriculum is built to reflect real-world compliance demands across cultivation, manufacturing, and retail operations. Every lesson is grounded in current industry standards, giving you actionable knowledge you can apply the moment you complete the program. Stay ahead of inspections, audits, and licensing requirements with confidence.

02





### Premium Career Positioning


A CannaVerse Academy credential signals to employers, partners, and regulators that you operate at the highest professional standard. Our graduates enter the industry — or advance within it — with a credential that commands respect. At an enrollment price of just $190, this is the highest-value investment available for cannabis career advancement today.

03







Designed for cannabis professionals, cultivators, manufacturers, medical practitioners, and retail compliance officers — every course is built to elevate your expertise and validate your authority in the field.
















Academic Standards

## Training Designed to Meet & Exceed Industry Benchmarks


CannaVerse Academy holds every course to the highest professional standard in the cannabis industry. Our curriculum is built on verified regulatory frameworks, peer-reviewed horticultural science, and real-world operational practice — ensuring every graduate is equipped to perform at the top of their field.


From seed to sale, our instructors draw on decades of combined expertise across cultivation, manufacturing, medicine, and retail compliance. This is not a generic certificate program. This is the definitive standard for medical cannabis courses — structured, rigorous, and immediately applicable in licensed facilities nationwide.




4
Core Pillars


$190
Enrollment


100%
Online Access













01

### Structured Learning Path


Every course follows a carefully sequenced curriculum — from foundational principles to advanced application. Students progress through clearly defined modules, assessments, and milestones that mirror the rigor of accredited professional training programs.











02

### Compliance-Minded Instruction


Regulatory accuracy is embedded in every lesson. Our instructors align course content with current state and federal compliance frameworks, ensuring students understand not just the science but the legal and operational standards governing licensed cannabis operations.











03

### Practical Professional Relevance


Theory meets practice. Each module incorporates real-world scenarios, industry case studies, and applied knowledge drawn directly from active cannabis facilities. Graduates leave prepared for the demands of cultivation floors, dispensary counters, and extraction labs — not just examinations.











04

### Premium Academy Experience


At $190 per enrollment, CannaVerse Academy delivers an unmatched return on educational investment. Students access professionally produced course materials, expert-authored content, and a learning environment built to the standard of the world's leading online professional schools — all within the cannabis sector.

Designed to meet and exceed industry standards, our curriculum equips you with the credentials and confidence to lead in a rapidly growing field.

The Standard for Cannabis Professionals


# Why CannaVerse Academy Sets the Professional Standard in Cannabis Education



CannaVerse Academy was built on a single conviction: cannabis professionals deserve the same rigorous, structured, and credentialed training that defines every other regulated industry. We are not a course marketplace. We are the definitive academic authority for cannabis professional education — delivering world-class medical cannabis courses engineered to meet and exceed the industry's highest benchmarks. Every module, every assessment, and every certification pathway reflects our commitment to producing graduates who are ready to lead.








### Our Mission


We exist to elevate the cannabis industry by establishing an uncompromising educational standard across the four core pillars that define professional practice: cultivation science, manufacturing and lean production, medicine and patient care, and retail compliance. CannaVerse Academy's curriculum is authored by active industry practitioners, reviewed against current regulatory frameworks, and structured with the academic discipline of a respected certification body. When you earn a CannaVerse credential, you carry proof that your training was built to last.





### Built for Serious Professionals


Our programs are designed for career-focused individuals who understand that premium training is an investment, not an expense. Whether you are entering the industry for the first time, transitioning from adjacent fields, or deepening existing expertise, CannaVerse Academy delivers the depth and professional credibility you need to stand apart. At $190 per enrollment, our courses represent the most accessible gateway to industry-standard cannabis professional education available anywhere — with immediate access and structured learning from day one.








Cultivation Science & Agronomy Training



Retail Compliance & Regulatory Standards



















Curriculum Framework


## How the CannaVerse Curriculum Is Built


Every module in the CannaVerse Academy curriculum is engineered against a rigorous internal framework — one that mirrors the demands of real cannabis industry roles and the evolving compliance landscape across North America.


Our instructional architects drew from medical cannabis courses, lean manufacturing methodologies, and regulatory compliance standards to produce a curriculum that does not merely inform — it transforms. Each of our four pillars (cultivation, manufacturing, medicine, and retail compliance) is designed to deliver verifiable, job-ready competency from the first lesson to the last.


The result is the most comprehensive cannabis training program available at any price point — now accessible for a single $190 enrollment.












Five Founding Principles




- 01 ### Clarity of Instruction Every concept is communicated in precise, accessible language — free of jargon that obscures rather than educates. Our courses are structured so that both newcomers and seasoned professionals can follow the material without friction, building genuine understanding at every stage.

- 02 ### Compliance Awareness Regulatory literacy is embedded throughout the entire curriculum. Students graduate with a thorough understanding of state-level licensing, seed-to-sale tracking, labeling mandates, and the shifting federal landscape — equipping them to operate confidently within any legal market.

- 03 ### Practical Application Theory without application is incomplete education. Each module concludes with scenario-based exercises, real-world case studies, and skill assessments that mirror the day-to-day decisions professionals face on cultivation floors, in dispensaries, and in processing facilities.

- 04 ### Multidisciplinary Breadth Cannabis is a convergent industry. Our curriculum draws from plant science, chemistry, pharmacology, lean manufacturing, retail operations, and healthcare communication — providing students with the cross-functional fluency that top employers actively seek.

- 05 ### Premium Learning Design World-class content deserves world-class delivery. Every course is crafted with a deliberate instructional architecture — sequenced for retention, paced for engagement, and produced to the highest editorial standards available in professional online education today.

Every module is authored by practitioners who have operated within licensed facilities, ensuring that the $190 enrollment investment delivers not just theory, but the applied knowledge demanded by today's cannabis industry.

Admissions & Enrollment


# We're Here to GuideYour Enrollment Journey


Whether you're ready to enroll in our industry-leading medical cannabis courses, have questions about our curriculum across cultivation, manufacturing, medicine, or retail compliance — or simply need your secure $190 payment link — our admissions team is standing by to help you take the next step with confidence.











### Admissions Guidance


Our admissions advisors walk you through the enrollment process step by step, ensuring you're set up for success from day one of your cannabis education.












### Program Clarity


Get precise answers about course content, learning outcomes, and certification pathways across our four core pillars — so you enroll knowing exactly what you'll master.












### Fast Response


Expect a reply within one business day. Once confirmed, we'll send your secure $190 enrollment payment link directly — so you can start learning without delay.



















Get In Touch


## Request Enrollment or Ask a Question


Our admissions team is ready to walk you through course details, curriculum highlights, and your direct payment link to enroll in any of our medical cannabis courses for just $190. Reach out — we respond promptly.

Admissions & Enrollment

## Common Questions AboutJoining CannaVerse Academy


Everything you need to know before enrolling in our industry-standard medical cannabis courses.













Q


### What does the $190 enrollment fee include?


Your $190 enrollment grants you full lifetime access to the complete CannaVerse Academy curriculum — covering all four core pillars: cultivation, manufacturing, medicine, and retail compliance. This includes all course modules, downloadable resources, industry-standard assessments, and your official certificate of completion. There are no hidden fees, no subscriptions, and no additional charges.






Q


### Who is this program designed for?


CannaVerse Academy is built for aspiring cannabis professionals, current industry workers seeking formal credentials, entrepreneurs planning to enter the cannabis market, and healthcare practitioners exploring medical cannabis applications. Whether you're starting from scratch or advancing an existing career, our curriculum is structured to meet you at your level and elevate your expertise to industry standard.






Q


### What topics and subjects are covered in the curriculum?


Our comprehensive curriculum spans four core pillars: Cultivation (plant biology, growing environments, harvest techniques), Manufacturing (extraction methods, product formulation, quality control), Medicine (cannabinoid science, patient care, medical cannabis courses and therapeutic applications), and Retail Compliance (regulations, licensing, dispensary operations, and consumer safety). Each pillar is taught to the highest industry benchmarks.






Q


### How do I receive my payment link after submitting an inquiry?


Once you submit your enrollment inquiry through our contact form, our admissions team will review your submission and send a secure payment link directly to the email address you provided — typically within one business day. The link will direct you to a secure checkout for the $190 enrollment fee. Upon payment confirmation, your course access credentials will be delivered immediately to your inbox.






Q


### Is the program fully online and self-paced?


Yes. CannaVerse Academy is a fully online platform accessible from any device, anywhere in the world. All course content is self-paced, meaning you progress on your own schedule with no deadlines or live session requirements. Once enrolled, your access never expires — revisit modules, review materials, and complete assessments entirely at your own pace.






Q


### Will I receive a certificate upon completion?


Absolutely. Upon successfully completing the CannaVerse Academy program, you will receive an official Certificate of Completion bearing the CannaVerse Academy credential. This certificate is designed to meet and exceed current industry benchmarks and can be used to demonstrate your professional qualifications to employers, licensing boards, and business partners in the cannabis sector.





















Online Access & Support

## Learn From Anywhere.Industry Standards, Delivered Digitally.


CannaVerse Academy is a fully online medical cannabis courses platform built to serve professionals across every pillar of the industry — cultivation, manufacturing, medicine, and retail compliance. No campus. No commute. Just world-class cannabis professional education, available wherever you are.








Admissions support responds within 1–2 business days. Our team is here to guide your enrollment and answer any questions about our $190 course program.

# Return Policy


Last Updated: 5/25/2026



At CannaVerse Academy, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy

































- Products All Courses




- Home
- Programs

0















# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/25/2026



CannaVerse Academy ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: CannaVerse Academy

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

































- Products All Courses




- Home
- Programs
- Authority
- Contact
0















# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 25, 2026



CannaVerse Academy is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: CannaVerse Academy

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions

































- Products All Courses




- Home
- Programs
- Authority

0















# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 25, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - CannaVerse Academy

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Cannabis Education & Training provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


CannaVerse Academy provides Cannabis Education & Training through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by CannaVerse Academy. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: CannaVerse Academy

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
